items.name: wcdb-key-tool
items.description: Extract WeChat (WCDB/SQLCipher4) database encryption keys on Linux. Auto-adapts to new versions via ELF static analysis — no manual reverse engineering needed per update. Linux 微信数据库密钥提取工具。通过 ELF静态分析自动适配新版本，无需每次更新手动逆向。

items.description: AI task orchestrator that breaks complex goals into parallel subtasks with interrupt/resume support. Brain (any LLM) decomposes goals, Workers (Claude Code / OpenAI / Anthropic SDK) execute in parallel.

items.name: AI-Burp-Copilot
items.description: AI Burp Copilot v2 是一个基于 Burp Suite Montoya API 的 AI 辅助渗透测试插件。它的目标不是替代被动扫描器，也不是让大模型自由发挥去“猜漏洞”，而是把 Burp 中真实经过的 HTTP 流量转化为可审计、可复放、可验证的安全分析工作流。

items.description: An emotion mother-tongue for AI. Chord notation as a cross-session, cross-base affect language. No third-party model required.

items.description: Extend the Chrome Debug Protocol (CDP) with custom commands, events, and middlewares. Tap into and modify browser behavior, access chrome.* extension APIs, and change how drivers like stagehand/playwright/puppeteer work.
